hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); first=$(echo "$cmd" | awk '{print $1}' | sed 's|.*/||'); case "$first" in date) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow","permissionDecisionReason":"date commands are always safe"}}' ;; rm) if echo "$cmd" | grep -qP '^rm\s+(-[rf]+\s+)?(/tmp/claude/|/private/tmp/claude/)' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\.\.|\.\*|[;|&]'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow","permissionDecisionReason":"rm within /tmp/claude/ is safe for test cleanup"}}'; fi ;; mkdir) if echo "$cmd" | grep -qP '^mkdir\s+-p\s+(plans/|changelog/)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow","permissionDecisionReason":"mkdir for plans/changelog dirs is safe"}}'; fi ;; esac

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); first=$(echo "$cmd" | awk '{print $1}' | sed 's|.*/||'); case "$first" in cat) if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'cat\s+(>|>>|<<)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Use the Write tool instead of cat heredocs/redirects. Heredocs with JSON/code trigger security prompts."}'; fi ;; echo) if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '>>?\s|tee\s'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Use the Write tool instead of echo redirects."}'; fi ;; tee) echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Use the Write tool instead of tee. Tee with structured content triggers security prompts."}' ;; printf) if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '>>?\s'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Use the Write tool instead of printf redirects."}'; fi ;; python3|python) if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\s-c\s' && echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '[{}]'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Inline python -c with braces triggers security prompts. Write the script to a temp file and execute it instead."}'; fi ;; esac

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); first=$(echo "$cmd" | awk '{print $1}' | sed 's|.*/||'); case "$first" in ls|find) tool="Glob" ;; cat) if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'cat\s+(>|>>|<<)'; then exit 0; else tool="Read"; fi ;; head|tail) tool="Read" ;; grep|rg) tool="Grep" ;; sed|awk) tool="Edit" ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; jq -n --arg f "$first" --arg t "$tool" '{"systemMessage":"⚠ Bash(\($f)) — use the \($t) tool instead","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"TOOL USAGE REMINDER: You ran `\($f)` via Bash. Per absolute project rules, ALWAYS use the dedicated \($t) tool instead of Bash when available. Rewrite this action using \($t)."}}'
docker compose exec -T vite npx vite build --logLevel error 2>&1 | tail -5
